# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

imports:
- path: compute_v1_global.jinja
  name: compute_v1_global

resources:
# Create VPC Network
- type: compute_v1_global.network
  properties:
    name: 'my-testnet'

# Three tier subnets
- type: compute_v1_global.subnetwork
  name: frontend-us-central1
  properties:
    region: 'us-central1'
    network: $(ref.my-testnet.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: '10.0.0.0/24'
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- type: compute_v1<｜begin▁of▁sentence｜>.subnetwork
  name: backend-us-central1
  properties:
    region: 'us-central1'
    network: $(ref.my-testnet.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: '10.0.1.0/24'
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true

- type: compute_v1_global.subnetwork
  name: db-us-central1
  properties:
    region: 'us-central1'
    network: $(ref.my-testnet.selfLink)
    ipCidrRange: '10.0.2.0/24'
    privateIpGoogleAccess: true
